Title: QNAP firmware 5.2.8.3359 upgrade for ANI
Notes: I logged into the QNAP system in the ANI environment and found that firmware updates were pending. Before proceeding with the update, I verified that all backup jobs had completed successfully. Since a reboot was required prior to installing the firmware, I rebooted the QNAP device, installed the updates, and then performed a second reboot to finalise the installation. After the system came back online, I verified that all shared folders were accessible. I then re-scanned the backup repository, and the scan completed successfully.

Title: Install current MS security updates on VMANI-GSS1 and VMANITS1
Notes:
Ticket Summary – Patch Management (Both VMs)

System: VMANI-GSS1

OS: Windows Server 2016 Standard (x64)

  • Encountered patch installation failures due to a role-based update rollback issue.

  • Identified missing Servicing Stack and dependency patches as the root cause.

  • Installed required prerequisite updates, including:

    • January 2026 Servicing Stack Update

    • January 2026 Cumulative Update for Windows Server 2016

    • .NET Runtime and Hosting Updates

    • Windows Malicious Software Removal Tool

    • Third-party updates (Chrome, VMware Tools, Visual C++ Redistributables)

  • Re-ran patch deployment successfully.

  • Verified all patches installed with no remaining missing or failed updates.

System: VMANITS1

OS: Windows Server 2022 Standard (x64)

  • Patch deployment initially failed due to a rollback issue caused by missing dependencies.

  • Installed required prerequisite and dependency patches, including:

    • January 2026 Cumulative Update for Windows Server 2022 (21H2)

    • Microsoft Office 2016 Security Updates (Word, Excel, Outlook, Access, PowerPoint)

    • Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributables

    • Third-party updates (Firefox, Adobe Acrobat Reader, Notepad++, VMware Tools)

  • Re-ran patch installation after dependencies were applied.

  • Confirmed all OS, security, and third-party patches installed successfully.

Final Status

  • Patch rollback issue resolved on both systems.

  • All dependency patches installed.

  • Patch deployment completed successfully.

  • Both systems are fully up to date.
